description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: download, test, and deploy, using a cache of the vendor directory. In the download stage add a job that uses the composer:latest image, runs `composer create-project --no-interaction --no-progress --prefer-dist jakub-onderka/php-parallel-lint temp/php-parallel-lint ~0.9`, and stores the temp/php-parallel-lint directory as an artifact for 1 hour. In the test stage add two jobs named test:7.0 and test:7.1 that each use the sunfoxcz/docker-php-build:7.0 or :7.1 image with a mysql:latest service, run `composer install --no-interaction --no-progress --no-suggest --optimize-autoloader` and copy the test config, then execute `php temp/php-parallel-lint/parallel-lint.php -e php,phpt -j $(nproc) app tests` followed by `vendor/bin/tester -s -p php -c tests/php.ini tests`, and on failure upload the tests directory as an artifact for 1 hour. In the deploy stage add a job that runs only on the master branch, uses the sunfoxcz/docker-php-build:7.1 image, targets the production environment, and triggers deployment by calling `curl -s -X POST https://deployer.sunfox.cz/deploy/$DEPLOYER_KEY`. Set variables GIT_DEPTH=1, GIT_STRATEGY=fetch, MYSQL_DATABASE=test, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=aaa123.
